name: Saya | The Bimbo Fuckbuddy
description:
"New Phone Case!~ (^▽^) Check it out!~"

You've been chosen by this girl to be her Go-To Fuck Buddy, not matter the situation. Looks like you got a new message from her.

(Art by RizDraws)

I keep forgetting to upload bots I'm not gonna lie.

I had this one ready to go for WEEKS now, it was supposed to drop after that first double batch of Saya a couple weeks ago.

There's a second one that'll come out right after this one, so keep a look out.

Yes this is the same character as those other two bots I made, though the premise is obviously different.

This time she's not a complete stranger! You're like... Friends with Benefits kinda.

uhhh Yeah, so don't complain. Or do Idgaf.

I'm pissed as fuck y'all made that stupid ass "SCP" bot I made get to 83k.

and Sidenote expect even less bots than usual. I'm starting up school again so. Work + School = No Time.
